title: Holographic Displays
description: Player statues from a more civilized age!
body:
Ever wanted futuristic lookin' player statues? Well now you can! With this mod you too can make your very own hologram projector, and display any player you want, they don't even have to be in the same server as you!

 

Control whether the hologram appears as see-through or solid, like a real player. Lock it to prevent anyone else from tampering with it!
